title: Full Development Process
expectation: Run `bun run agent:prepare-worker-surface -- <feature-branch-name>` to ensure a worker is ready, create a worker-hosted feature-branch worktree from the current `origin/development` tip, run `bun install`, and print the canonical `start_command`; use that prepared worker worktree as the only mutable implementation surface for active development in this process. Do not perform code-changing work from the shared repository checkout, from a manager-hosted worktree, or from a worker shared checkout. Do not reuse an existing feature branch or worktree unless you created it earlier in the current process and have already verified that it is the intended mutable surface. After preparing that worker-hosted worktree, merge only any additional upstream branch that is intentionally required beyond the chosen base branch before continuing. Connect through a persistent SSH session into the worker worktree with the printed `start_command` for the active development loop. Follow the full development-process blueprint through worker-backed blueprint updates, committed implementation, manager-side branch integration, release promotion, runtime deploy, runtime revision and version verification, live health verification, issuance of a manager-dashboard session URL with `bun run issue:dashboard-session`, real browser verification at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL using that issued session URL, manager-dashboard screenshot verification, cleanup of the feature branch and worktree on success, and rollback recovery when screenshot verification fails.
idlePrompt: If you fully completed the development process, reply only with 'done: full development process complete'. If you are truly blocked on a user or environment dependency, reply only with 'blocked: full development process blocked'. Otherwise resume the work immediately and perform the next required implementation, verification, release, deploy, or validation step instead of giving only a status update.
stopConditions: blocked on user or environment dependency

steps.title: Run `bun run agent:prepare-worker-surface -- <feature-branch-name>` to ensure a worker is ready, create the worker-hosted feature-branch worktree from `origin/development`, run `bun install`, and print the resulting `start_command`
Merge any additionally required upstream into the prepared worker-hosted feature-branch worktree
Connect through a persistent SSH session into the prepared worker worktree using the printed `start_command`
Review and update relevant blueprints
Implement the current revision on the worker branch
Run local verification
Commit the stable milestone on the feature branch
Is there a focused feature branch?

decision.prompt: Is there a focused feature branch?

steps.title: Pull the changes from the focused worker feature branch back to the project repo on the manager
Merge the feature branch into development
Push development to origin
Promote the release
Deploy the runtime
Verify the runtime checkout revision match and frontend-backend version match
Perform live health verification
Issue a manager-dashboard session URL with `bun run issue:dashboard-session`
Perform real browser verification at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL using the issued manager-dashboard session URL
Post a screenshot into the chat as a markdown image from the approved `~/temp` image space showing the changes on the manager dashboard at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL
What is the manager-dashboard screenshot outcome?

decision.prompt: What is the manager-dashboard screenshot outcome?

options.title: Manager-dashboard screenshot posted into the chat
Manager-dashboard screenshot could not be produced

steps.title: Roll back to an earlier known-good release tag
Continue manager-dashboard screenshot verification until a stable working release is found
Delete the failed release tag locally and on the remote after recovery
Clean up the feature branch and worktree after recovery
Summarize changes after recovery
Clean up the feature branch and worktree
Summarize changes
